completed_tasks.name: Wire OutlineNode badge evolution, ContentPanel prop threading, DocumentsTab ReviewProvider, ProjectWorkspace phaseNumber prop

decisions.decision: Fixed Tailwind overflow-hidden vs overflow-auto class conflict in ProjectWorkspace by making them mutually exclusive
decisions.rationale: Both classes target the same CSS property; overflow-hidden always won, breaking scroll on overview/fases tabs

decisions.decision: Empty outline sections greyed out at 40% opacity with click disabled
decisions.rationale: Unwritten phases should be visually distinct and non-interactive since there's no content to display

decisions.decision: Moved useState calls above null guards in ReviewActionBar and ReviewSummary
decisions.rationale: React Rules of Hooks requires hooks to be called unconditionally

context_notes: Phase 12 fully complete and verified. All 3 plans executed (backend verification endpoint, review UI components, end-to-end wiring). Verification passed after fixing 2 hooks violations. Two bonus UI fixes shipped: scroll restoration and greyed-out empty sections. Test data seeded in backend/projects/2 for VERIFICATION.md review display. Phase 13 (export-assembly) is next — 2 remaining phases in v2.0 milestone.
